channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Comedian Chris Fleming loves Terry Gross
item.description: In the new HBO special from Chris Fleming, the comedian spends a lot of time talking about Terry Gross. Wild Card host Rachel Martin talks to Fleming about what he loves about the Fresh Air host.
item.content:encoded: In the new HBO special from Chris Fleming, the comedian spends a lot of time talking about Terry Gross. Wild Card host Rachel Martin talks to Fleming about what he loves about the Fresh Air host.

item.title: This tale of a Chicago school book ban was inspired by true events
item.description: Librarian Jarrett Dapier's graphic novel tells a fictionalized account of real-life events in 2013 that restricted access to Marjane Satrapi's memoir Persepolis in Chicago Public Schools.
item.content:encoded: Librarian Jarrett Dapier's graphic novel tells a fictionalized account of real-life events in 2013 that restricted access to Marjane Satrapi's memoir Persepolis in Chicago Public Schools.
item.dc:creator: Tahneer Oksman

item.title: Chilean Smiljan Radić Clarke wins architecture's highest honor
item.description: The Pritzker Prize was awarded Thursday. "In every work, he is able to answer with radical originality, making the unobvious obvious," said fellow Chilean architect and prize chair Alejandro Aravena.
item.content:encoded:
The Pritzker Prize was awarded Thursday. "In every work, he is able to answer with radical originality, making the unobvious obvious," said fellow Chilean architect and prize chair Alejandro Aravena.

(Image credit: Iwan Baan)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: 'Songs from the Hole': The story behind JJ'88's documentary and visual album
item.description: The visual album and documentary Songs from the Hole tells the story of James Jacobs, the hip-hop artist JJ'88, as he reflects on his coming-of-age within California's state prison system.
item.content:encoded:
Songs from the Hole. Before the song starts, protagonist and producer James "JJ'88" Jacobs describes meditating on his and others' redemption while incarcerated and in solitary confinement.'/>

The visual album and documentary Songs from the Hole tells the story of James Jacobs, the hip-hop artist JJ'88, as he reflects on his coming-of-age within California's state prison system.

(Image credit: Courtesy of Netflix)
item.dc:creator: Kara Frame

item.title: 5 ways to resist the urge to keep looking at your phone
item.description: So you want to spend less time on your phone. How do you do that when it's designed to suck you in? Life Kit spoke to experts in behavioral science, psychology and technology for real-world advice.
item.content:encoded: So you want to spend less time on your phone. How do you do that when it's designed to suck you in? Life Kit spoke to experts in behavioral science, psychology and technology for real-world advice.
item.dc:creator: Marielle Segarra

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Dane on caring for her late husband, Eric Dane, and synthetic voices
item.description: The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.
item.content:encoded:
The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.

(Image credit: Alberto E. Rodriguez / Getty Images for Chrysalis Butterfly Ball)
item.dc:creator: Juana Summers

item.title: It took a volunteer to get a small town senior center off the ground
item.description: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.content:encoded: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.dc:creator: Laura Palmisano

item.title: Harrison Ford isn't retiring: 'I really wouldn't know what to do with myself'
item.description: Ford struggled to find his footing in Hollywood before being cast as Han Solo in Star Wars. Now 83, he plays a therapist in the Apple TV series Shrinking: "I really do love the work," he says.
item.content:encoded:
Ford struggled to find his footing in Hollywood before being cast as Han Solo in Star Wars. Now 83, he plays a therapist in the Apple TV series Shrinking: "I really do love the work," he says.

(Image credit: Valerie Macon)
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: The 2026 Oscars' best original song nominees, cruelly ranked
item.description: There are two clear frontrunners in this year's best original song race, either of which would be a worthy Oscar winner. Diane Warren is also nominated, for the 17th time.
item.content:encoded:
There are two clear frontrunners in this year's best original song race, either of which would be a worthy Oscar winner. Diane Warren is also nominated, for the 17th time.

(Image credit: Netflix)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: Marty Crunchwrap Supreme and more menu ideas for your 2026 Oscars party
item.description: You're inviting folks over to watch the Oscars, but you want to serve them a bill-of-fare that reflects this year's idiosyncratic slate of best picture nominees. We can help with that.
item.content:encoded:
You're inviting folks over to watch the Oscars, but you want to serve them a bill-of-fare that reflects this year's idiosyncratic slate of best picture nominees. We can help with that.

(Image credit: Abi Inman)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon
